diagrams.name: distributed_tracing_core
diagrams.title: Distributed Tracing — Core Instrumentation
diagrams.description: Developer creates, annotates, and finishes spans to instrument PHP application code
diagrams.scope: Core tracing primitives used by any actor instrumenting PHP code

diagrams.name: scope_management
diagrams.title: Scope & Active Span Management
diagrams.description: Activating, querying, and closing scopes to track the currently active span in a request
diagrams.scope: Scope lifecycle management across DDTrace and OpenTracing adapters

diagrams.name: opentracing_compatibility
diagrams.title: OpenTracing API Compatibility
diagrams.description: Using the OpenTracing standard API to start, propagate, and finish traces via DDTrace adapters
diagrams.scope: OpenTracing 1.x and legacy adapter surfaces

diagrams.name: context_propagation
diagrams.title: Distributed Context Propagation
diagrams.description: Injecting and extracting trace context across service boundaries (HTTP headers, message queues)
diagrams.scope: Cross-service trace context injection and extraction

diagrams.name: span_events_and_links
diagrams.title: Span Events, Links & Git Metadata
diagrams.description: Attaching structured events, causal links, and source-code Git metadata to spans
diagrams.scope: Span enrichment with events, links, and deployment metadata

diagrams.name: integration_api
diagrams.title: Framework & Library Integration API
diagrams.description: Third-party framework integrations implement the Integration interface to hook into the tracer lifecycle
diagrams.scope: Plugin/integration registration and lifecycle

diagrams.name: symfony_integration
diagrams.title: Symfony Framework Auto-Instrumentation
diagrams.description: Automatic tracing of Symfony HTTP routes — endpoint discovery, cache, and method extraction
diagrams.scope: Symfony route-to-span mapping and endpoint catalog generation

diagrams.name: laravel_service_providers
diagrams.title: Laravel Service Provider Integration
diagrams.description: Bootstrapping Datadog tracing within a Laravel application via service providers
diagrams.scope: Laravel application bootstrap and tracer registration

diagrams.name: installation_and_setup
diagrams.title: Datadog PHP Agent Installation & Setup
diagrams.description: DevOps installs, configures, and upgrades the Datadog PHP tracer extension
diagrams.scope: Installation wizard, INI configuration, and web server restart

diagrams.name: transport_and_agent_communication
diagrams.title: Transport & Datadog Agent Communication
diagrams.description: Flushing finished spans to the local Datadog Agent over HTTP or Unix socket
diagrams.scope: Trace payload serialization and delivery to the agent

diagrams.name: gitlab_ci_pipeline_generation
diagrams.title: GitLab CI Pipeline Configuration Generation
diagrams.description: CI automation generates GitLab pipeline YAML for tracer, profiler, appsec, and packaging jobs
diagrams.scope: CI/CD pipeline generation for multi-component releases

diagrams.name: error_handling_and_fatal_recovery
diagrams.title: Error Handling & Fatal Error Recovery
diagrams.description: Catching, reporting, and recovering from PHP fatal errors inside instrumented applications
diagrams.scope: Exception capture and fatal-error display/recovery pipeline

diagrams.name: wordpress_recovery_mode
diagrams.title: WordPress Recovery Mode Workflow
diagrams.description: Admin receives recovery email, follows secure link, and manages PHP error recovery sessions
diagrams.scope: WordPress secure recovery mode session lifecycle

diagrams.name: wordpress_rest_api_posts
diagrams.title: WordPress REST API — Posts & Content
diagrams.description: External API consumer creates, reads, updates, and deletes posts and revisions via REST
diagrams.scope: WordPress REST posts, revisions, and blocks CRUD

diagrams.name: wordpress_rest_api_media
diagrams.title: WordPress REST API — Media & Attachments
diagrams.description: API consumer uploads, processes, and retrieves media attachments; oEmbed endpoint proxying
diagrams.scope: Media upload, metadata extraction, and oEmbed proxy

diagrams.name: wordpress_rest_api_taxonomy_and_types
diagrams.title: WordPress REST API — Taxonomies & Post Types
diagrams.description: API consumer lists and retrieves taxonomy terms, post types, and post statuses
diagrams.scope: WordPress taxonomy, post type, and status metadata endpoints

diagrams.name: wordpress_rest_api_search_and_themes
diagrams.title: WordPress REST API — Search, Themes & Settings
diagrams.description: API consumer searches site content, lists active themes, and reads/writes site settings
diagrams.scope: WordPress search, theme listing, and settings REST endpoints

diagrams.name: wordpress_rest_api_block_renderer
diagrams.title: WordPress REST API — Block Renderer
diagrams.description: API consumer server-side renders a registered Gutenberg block via the block renderer endpoint
diagrams.scope: Server-side block rendering via REST API

diagrams.name: wordpress_theme_customization
diagrams.title: WordPress Theme Customization
diagrams.description: Admin previews, adjusts settings, and publishes theme customizations via the Customizer
diagrams.scope: WordPress Customizer settings and live preview lifecycle

diagrams.name: akismet_spam_protection
diagrams.title: Akismet Spam Protection Plugin
diagrams.description: Admin configures API key and spam settings; REST API exposes key management and stats
diagrams.scope: Akismet plugin REST API — key, settings, stats, and alerts

diagrams.name: json_serialization_service
diagrams.title: JSON Serialization Service
diagrams.description: Application encodes and decodes structured data as JSON for REST responses and plugin communication
diagrams.scope: Low-level JSON encode/decode utility used across WordPress and plugins
